name: TidyData
tagline: Clean any messy spreadsheet — the AI proposes, the engine proves, you approve.
description:
TidyData turns Anna into a trustworthy data-cleaning companion. Paste a messy CSV or spreadsheet, and Anna proposes plain-English cleaning operations (trim spaces, fix dates, dedupe rows, normalize numbers, split columns). A deterministic Executa engine — never the model — applies each operation and reports the exact rows and cells it changed, so the numbers can't be hallucinated. Nothing touches your data until you click Approve.

**What's inside**

- A clean single-window UI with a live data preview, an issues scan, and an approve/skip review queue.
- `tidy-engine` — Executa stdio tool (Python) that is the single source of truth for the table.
- `tidy-coach` — declarative SKILL.md enforcing the propose-then-ratify protocol.

**How to use**

Mention the app in chat (`#tidy-data`) or open the window. Paste your rows, press Analyze, review each proposed fix, approve the ones you want, and export a clean CSV back into chat.
_comment_bundled_executas: Executas that ship inside this app. `anna-app apps publish` publishes each one first, then substitutes its server-minted tool_id into every `bundled:<handle>` reference in manifest.json (in memory) and writes bundle/anna-tool-ids.js so the UI bundle can read the same ids.
